h08be459dg8317g48e8g96dag8c89fa2d5389: *Freshly turned soil shifts beneath your feet as you approach the grave.*
h2358f45cg46c9g4fdfg93e2ga00b2b391bc0: Bow your head and silently pay your respects.
ha06748dcgd104g41d7g8895g44bb16ee66d2: *You close your eyes, finding a moment of peace.*
hc8cc1907g3e30g4976gadf4g9aff4bdf1cfb: May you rest with your god, in peace.
ha249048dg6626g4111gb9f5g65be1071395a: *A sense of calm settles in your heart.*
h88c3ea6bg9bbcg4a81gae6bg2d0b0c1cf62f: Death is not a punishment, but just another path. In Kelemvor's name, I honour your passing.
h282672begf9ebg4913ga84dg6518106e0a40: *Though your ministry is late, you sense Kelemvor's approval of your prayer.*
he3561f7fg97aag4857gbb90g64bc67ab5891:
'From lowest ditch to highest thrones
All those that live are naught but bones.'
h53e1a4dbg1806g46d3g81deg45e49ef228b4: *A soothing chill runs through you. A soft breeze seems to whisper Myrkul's approval.*
h0213aa13g2e81g44dcg8344gb8e76754ad8b: You failed your people. I pray you serve better in the next life than in this one.
h1980fd06g301cg44c5gae0cga3dbb3a4429d: Covered in dirt, to be devoured by worms. A fitting end for a failed warrior.
hbd575a29g02e4g487fgb5e2g7db60b7fe5be: *This burial custom is strange, but you are beginning to make sense of it.*
hed8b6328ga088g4224gbc2egd2aab15707b4:
'O sing a song of Elturel, and when the night does fall,
Sleep safe beneath Companion's light, until the dawn does call.'
hf3be427agff0cg455fga23ag6372abb546c0: *Your heart lightens as you finish the song.*
h7278f4b0g1d78g4c02ga8d3gb3325a707546: Embrace the dark, and Shar will help you to forget your sufferings.
he0dd16a7g08fbg4ffbg9ed3g14ee225e5f6c: *You close your eyes, imagining what Shar's final blessing will feel like when your time comes.*
hdb0a29cagd957g4447g8d27g8bb89887c4d1: I swear, I will protect those who remain here, whatever the cost.
hefeb36c0gfd12g447fga8a5g4c16e4c86858: *You take comfort in your promise. You cannot raise the dead - but you can aid the living.*
h8b037780g53bdg4706ga1cfgb8ebbca2c29a: Ugh. Already rotting. I prefer my meat fresh.
h79cdd814gbd31g4b5bg882fgf522a3fd2db7: *Or maybe... well, only if you find nothing tastier.*
h23e5678agea0ag4b1bgaba4gace675496a18: *Fragile silence. You hear nothing. You see nothing. Nothing.*
h90a835cdg4b20g4e52ga904g3f138dbdbf49: A monument to the dead? Such a maudlin tradition.
hd4591856gfd84g4e8ag8edeg7b56a33c589b: *Your mind wanders to the astral plane. Immortality awaits, if - or rather, when - you gain Vlaakith's favour.*
hc74ae3a2ge048g4a01ga969g80d7d901f40a: I hope death is more peaceful for you than life...
ha08e3a75g797ag4ef7g8c69g03fafaec4a7f: *Until you are free of Zariel, death will only ever be a return to the horrors of Avernus.*
ha95cf424g7f95g448dga6b3g360eda25a548: To die a protector and be buried by friends. There is no finer end.
h35cc7aefg2aa8g4ebbg89e7g84238f46cf74: This is how they honour their dead? Interesting.
hd6f62d55g8d6fg4505ga9d4g50333f04759f: Close your eyes and open your senses.
h09145836g1ce9g44e6gaa6egda657e893ab8: *You catch the scent of blood mixed with urine. This person died in pain. They died afraid.*
h6827099eg1dc5g46c4g993egbab6ccc558d5: Look around cautiously, then dig with your hands.
hc5d776ccg3065g42cagb8eegf7b17483866e: *Your fingers claw at the dirt, losing purchase. If only you had a tool for this.*
h4a81f18cge694g45d9g90feg3f0cf9f2ad72: Look around cautiously, then begin to dig.
